title: Podman 4.6.0 OpenAPI Spec is missing properties
body: ### Issue Description The OpenAPI specification for podman 4.6.0 is missing a lot of properties for definitions. For example with SpecGenerator: 4.5.1 (about 900 Lines of properties) vs 4.6.0 (no properties at all) ### Steps to reproduce the issue Have a look at: https://storage.googleapis.com/libpod-master-releases/swagger-v4.6.0.yaml vs https://storage.googleapis.com/libpod-master-releases/swagger-v4.5.1.yaml ### Describe the results you received The 4.6.0 spec is way smaller indicating a LOT of missing properties ### Describe the results you expected Similar document sizes containing all definitions ### podman info output ```yaml not applicable ``` ### Podman in a container No ### Privileged Or Rootless None ### Upstream Latest Release Yes ### Additional environment details _No response_ ### Additional information _No response_

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @LucaDev !

@baude can you take a look?
I looked for a bit, and it is not obvious to me.  Swagger is one of those things I never fully groaked.  I wonder if @jwhonce might know what the deal is?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@LucaDev Do you have any ideas on how to fix this?
I just stumbled upon it while trying to use the API. I'll have a look at it.
Pretty sure the lastest swagger should look good again.
